title: The Homeless Man
description: This Mod Adds A Silly Little Homeless Man!
body:
Get ready for the Homeless Man, a deadly and enigmatic character who prowls the plains and villages. He is quick, intelligent, and has a few tricks up his sleeve. He stalks you, opens doors, and instills fear in everyone he encounters.

Intense AI leaps at targets, hunts monsters, is tempted by food, and engages in fierce combat.


You'll hear unique noises and death effects.

If you dare to confront him, you can unlock exclusive advancements.

Discover a special place where he spawns, giving your world more intrigue and peril.
